zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Southwick於1605年10月27日出生在英國斯塔福爾特哈爾時，她的父親Edward Southwick37歲，母親Anne Shelley33歲。她和William Nichols至少有1個兒子。她去世於1696年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可托普斯費爾德享年91歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Southwick于1605年10月27日出生在英国斯塔福爾特哈爾时，她的父亲Edward Southwick37岁，母亲Anne Shelley33岁。她和William Nichols至少有1个儿子。她去世于1696年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可托普斯費爾德享年91岁。

nameMeanings.name: Southwick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Southwick, including those in Durham, Gloucestershire, Hampshire, Northamptonshire, Sussex, and Wiltshire, named with Old English sūth ‘south, southern’ + wīc ‘dwelling, specialized farm’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Southwick was born on 27 October 1605, in Tettenhall, Staffordshire, England, her father, Edward Southwick, was 37 and her mother, Anne Shelley, was 33. She had at least 1 son with William Nichols. She died in 1696, in Topsfield, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 91.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Southwickが1605年10月27日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアテッテンハルで生まれた時，父Edward Southwickは37歳，母Anne Shelleyは33歳であった。彼女はWilliam Nicholsとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1696年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックストプスフィールドで91歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Southwick(이)가 1605년 10월 27일 영국 스태퍼드실르 테텐홀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edward Southwick(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Shelley(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 William Nichols(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1696년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 토프스필드에서 91세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Southwick родилась 27 октября 1605 г. в местности теттенолл, стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Edward Southwick было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Shelley, 33. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от William Nichols. Она умерла в 1696 г. в местности топсфиелд, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 91 год.
